overall.description: Gameplay footage from God of War Ragnarök featuring Kratos walking through a rocky desert canyon before boarding a wooden boat and rowing through a winding river. The journey passes ancient stone ruins, wooden crane structures, and large water wheels under bright midday sun with cinematic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon path leading to water

agents.ego_description: Kratos walking steadily through the sandy canyon floor toward the river bank, with the Leviathan Axe strapped to his back

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rock formations with layered sedimentary texture
steep cliff face with hanging icicle-like mineral deposits
ancient stone structures visible in the canyon background
reddish-brown desert bushes and sparse grass

segments.scene_description: Kratos walks through a narrow desert canyon with steep rock walls on both sides. The ground is sandy with sparse dry vegetation, and ancient ruins are visible in the distant background under a bright partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow river passage with wooden crane structures

events.description: Kratos boards the wooden boat and begins rowing with Atreus seated in the bow
passing under a large wooden crane structure with heavy chains suspended over the water

agents.ego_description: Kratos rowing the boat through the narrow canyon waterway, navigating between the close rock walls

notable_agents.action: Atreus seated in the front of the boat, facing forward toward the journey ahead

entered.detail: ornate wooden vessel with dragon head prow and red decorative patterns
large wooden lifting apparatus with chains spanning the river canyon
heavy iron chains hanging from the crane structure above the water

segments.scene_description: Kratos boards a wooden boat and begins rowing through a narrow river canyon. The boat passes under an ancient wooden crane structure with heavy chains as the canyon walls rise steeply on both sides, creating an enclosed waterway.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding river canyon with scattered rock formations

agents.ego_description: continuing to row through the winding canyon, navigating around large rock outcroppings in the water

notable_agents.action: Atreus remains seated in the boat bow, occasionally looking around at the canyon walls

entered.detail: massive boulder formation rising from the water in the river
calm water surface with light mist hovering above

segments.scene_description: The boat navigates through a wider section of the canyon river, winding between large rock outcroppings. The water is calm with light mist, and the canyon opens slightly to reveal more sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient ruin site with stone gate and water wheels

events.description: large ancient stone gate and ruins become visible ahead in the distance
massive wooden water wheels come into view on the right side of the river

agents.ego_description: rowing toward the ancient stone structures, approaching the water wheels and ruins

notable_agents.action: Atreus pointing toward the ruins ahead, engaged in conversation

entered.detail: massive stone portal with columns and carved architecture
large wooden water wheels attached to stone buildings
tall ancient columns rising from the riverbank
tall trees with hanging moss on the rocky outcrops

segments.scene_description: The river opens into a wide area with ancient stone ruins. Kratos rows toward a massive stone gate while large wooden water wheels become visible on the right bank. The environment transitions from enclosed canyon to an open ruin site with scattered palm trees and ancient architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow, arid desert canyon into an expansive river landscape filled with ancient ruins. It begins with Kratos walking through a sandy pass flanked by steep rock walls and sparse vegetation under a bright, partly cloudy sky. As he boards a wooden boat, the scene shifts to a winding waterway where the camera glides under a heavy wooden crane structure with massive chains. The river then opens slightly, navigating through calm, misty waters and rock outcroppings before the canyon walls recede entirely. Finally, the environment expands into a wide ruin site, passing large wooden water wheels and scattered palm trees as the boat rows toward a massive stone gate.
